Two keystrokes are considered as part of one typehead session if time difference between them is less than 1 sec

On success, you will see a series of "PASS" messages, followed by "TEST COMPLETE".

1. space key as part of search string.
PASS select.matches(":open") is false
PASS select.value is "United States"
2. space key as part of search string with some delay.
PASS select.matches(":open") is false
PASS select.value is "Spain"
3. space key to open select menu.
PASS select.matches(":open") is true
PASS select.value is "United Arab Emirates"
PASS successfullyParsed is true

TEST COMPLETE

Canada
Spain
United Arab Emirates
United States
